Home / Services / Website Hosting / Professional Hosting

🚀 Professional Hosting

For businesses where performance and reliability are mission-critical. Professional Hosting provides 100GB ultra-fast NVMe storage, dedicated CPU and RAM resources (not shared), auto-scaling that handles traffic spikes automatically, enterprise-grade security with WAF (Web Application Firewall) and malware scanning, unlimited email accounts, a free dedicated IP address, and white-glove migration from your current host — we move everything for you with zero downtime. Includes real-time monitoring, instant alerts, and a dedicated support channel with 1-hour response times. Ideal for high-traffic sites, busy e-commerce stores, and SaaS applications.

Service Details

Category: Website Hosting

Credits Price: 48 credits (approx. £60)

Turnaround: Monthly subscription

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within Monthly subscription
Book Professional Hosting Now

Related Website Hosting Services

  • Starter Hosting — Reliable shared hosting for small websites, blogs, and portfolios with 10GB SSD storage. (8 credits)
  • Business Hosting — Enhanced hosting for growing businesses with 50GB SSD, staging environment, and priority support. (24 credits)
  • Enterprise Hosting — Fully managed, high-availability hosting with dedicated infrastructure and 24/7 VIP support. (120 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Professional Hosting?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: Monthly subscription
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
